title: Gauravaram Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Gauravaram, with a Z-Score of +4.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Gauravaram is causing extreme temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, and the wind speed is 6.7 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave situation, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and high CDD values, indicating a significant heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
